units.notes: Single squashed commit (17f67e8), preceded by a retrofit-kickoff commit (9aaa89a onboard) — no red-before-green git evidence. review-findings.json present but informal (inline-review, not the structured multi-agent schema); credited as a qualified pass on the review-happened half, but the CRITICAL test-ordering criterion is unmet.

auth.spec.ts header-name assertions were corrected to logout-button assertions after discovering Header never renders the full name — a legitimate reality-correction, not weakening. RTL + Testcontainers integration tests are substantive.
Mostly confined to auth domain; fe05b5f CI/traceability wiring commit is cross-cutting infra riding along without an explicit spec citation, docked but not disqualifying.
No TODO/dead code/thrash found; tasks.md fully ticked; forward-only commit sequence.

Squashed commit obscures true red/green ordering, but tests trace to FR-MEM/TOPIC/CITY ids and review-findings.json documents 4 real confirmed-and-fixed defects before archive — substantively satisfies the review-then-archive half.
Proportionate, specific FE/BE tests; but the 3 review-caught bugs (transactional replace, upload allowlist, orphaned files) have no evidenced regression test locking in the fix.
Clean domain boundary; later cross-cutting work (service extraction, Testcontainers suite) is separate and clearly labeled, not smuggled in.
No thrash signal, but Phase-7 fixes to this domain were uncommitted at time of writing (mild unsettled-state signal) and no positive TODO/dead-code sweep was confirmed.

Archived proposal.md/design.md explicitly SELF-DISCLOSE the retrofit: "captures the already-implemented public memory feed... so the slice can move through Phase 4 with explicit tests, review evidence, and archive history." Direct textual admission that implementation predated spec/tests — the opposite of red-before-green.

Judge directly read FeedPage.test.tsx: real assertions (empty state, error state, toHaveBeenLastCalledWith), not tautological. Docked because tests were written against already-working code, so their regression-catching power is unverified.
04bd2b7's service-layer extraction touches FeedService with no reference in this slice's own tasks.md/design.md — an unexplained cross-module edit not tracked back to the spec.

review-findings.json discloses 2 real fixes (unbounded feed size, inaccessible filter selects) plus 2 named accepted trade-offs (N+1, like-toggle race) rather than hiding them — honest-disclosure pattern.
Two squashed feature commits (backend + frontend) with no red-phase evidence; review-findings.json absent (review substance documented only in prose in current-state.md).
Proportionate real tests (LostServiceTest.kt 244 lines), 93/93 integration tests green; one spec scenario (malformed contact email) left unconfirmed by the spot-check.

b9037e8's own commit message says "UI polish + architecture refactor" — self-admitted scope-broadening; f92925c bundles an app-wide AbortSignal adoption + full i18n catalog extraction into lost-domain history with no spec justification.
No TODO/dead code/thrash found; tasks.md 25/25 ticked; the later year-range validation fix reads as legitimate remediation, not churn.
Single squashed commit (131ccfa) is the only commit touching the archive; review-findings.json absent despite prose evidence of 5 majors + minors found and fixed by 3 parallel reviewers.

11 behavior-specific AdminPage tests (cascade-delete sibling rows, pending guards, banner cross-clear), real Testcontainers AdminIntegrationTest; only a 3/18 scenario spot-check was possible from the evidence.
Follow-on commits (service extraction, Testcontainers suite, e2e locator fix) are separate and narrowly scoped, not smuggled into the slice commit.
No thrash; the only irregularity (duplicated-date folder name, fixed in Phase 7) is explicitly cosmetic, not code churn.

Original archive commit shipped with NO tasks.md at all (one was authored retrospectively in Phase 7, still uncommitted) and no review-findings.json — reconstructed-after-the-fact artifacts, not evidence of spec-first process.
Test counts (6+9=15) match documentation exactly; the BC-BRAND-01 no-exclamation-mark claim was independently re-verified by grep (0 matches), not just trusted.
Frontend-only, static-content, no backend touched — clean domain confinement; the spec-file mojibake corruption is an in-domain quality gap, not scope drift.
Single clean commit, no TODO/dead code/thrash reported; docked slightly since no review-findings.json means craft wasn't gate-checked.
